characters.name: Aaron Jacobs
characters.description: Aaron JacobsBackground informationPortrayed byDylan NealCharacter informationGenderMaleSpeciesMortalRelativesShirley Jacobs (mother)Bob Jacobs (father)Unnamed brotherSabrina Spellman(ex-fiancé)SourceAaron Jacobsis a mortal band promoter and the ex-fiancé ofSabrina Spellman. Aaron meets Sabrina atScorch Magazine. They begin dating shortly afterward. They become serious until Aaron becomes jealous of Sabrina's ex-boyfriend namedHarveystill being in her life. Aaron's parents also don't approve of Sabrina, which throws a wrench into the relationship, shortly after Aaron proposes to her. Being a band promoter, Aaron is called out to Los Angeles, which is why he proposes to marry Sabrina so suddenly. Though a good guy, Aaron's past relationships have always ended with him marrying to truly be together with his love, which unfortunately has ended with separations. On the day of the wedding, Sabrina travels to the North Star to see if her and Aaron's soul stones match perfectly, which they don't. Even though she tries to carve them to make them match, she only manages to reshape his soul stone even more. At the altar, she reveals to Aaron that she is not as truly in love with him and apologizes to him, which he courteously accepts, and wishes only the best for her as she does for him. Sabrina then reluctantly leaves him at the altar, following her heart to belong to Harvey.

characters.name: Albert the Quizmaster
characters.description: This article is about Albert, Sabrina's Quiz Master fromSeason 2, you may be looking for the occupation:Quiz Master. Albert the QuizmasterBackground informationPortrayed byAlimi BallardCharacter informationGenderMaleSpeciesWitchSourceAlbert aka Quizmasteris a witch who trains and quizzesSabrinaso that she can get herWitch's License. Albert was Sabrina'sQuiz MasterinSeason Two, with the job of teaching her how to use magic, so that she can receive herWitch's Licenseafter a year of witch training. Throughout the year, he was only known as Quizmaster; however, his name is revealed later in the season. Sabrina is underwhelmed when his name turns out to be Albert, so they decide to stick with Quizmaster instead. Though Sabrina likes to work with him, she often finds him annoying and very strict. He is very tough on her and doesn't cut her any slack.  However, he is a fair tutor and helps Sabrina become a better witch. Sabrina's final test to get her witches license is inMom Vs Magic.  She was still mad at him for what he had to put her through and sent him somewhere else. He was no longer needed after Sabrina passed her Witch's test.

characters.name: Alberto Guadagno
characters.description: Albertois awitch-turned-mortal who lives in Rome. He had a brief romantic relationship withGwenin the TV movie, "Sabrina Goes to Rome." Alberto's family was once a family of witches, but they were stripped of theirmagicand cast out ofthe Other Realmsometime in the past. Alberto's mother,Mrs. Guadagno, runs a hotel that provides room and board to witches when they visit the "eternal city."Gwen,Sabrina Spellman's friend, falls for Alberto but his shyness and deficiency with the English language, keeps him from verbalizing the reciprocation of her feelings. Unfortunately, when Gwen tries to cast a love spell on him, she accidentally transforms him into a pigeon. She learns that in order to turn him back, she will have to kiss him..but first she has to find him. Gwen kisses nearly all of the pigeons in Rome until she finally finds Alberto who, as a pigeon, tried to exposePaulandTravis' scheme to expose her and Sabrina as witches. Alberto finally expresses his feelings for Gwen.

characters.name: Ally Wiccan
characters.description: Ally WiccanBackground informationPortrayed byAlexandra Hart-GilliamsCharacter informationGenderFemaleSpeciesWitchStatusAliveSource Ally Wiccanis the youngest daughter ofMarigoldand the sister ofAmanda. Ally visits her cousinSabrinain the Mortal Realm with her mom and her sister. Ally is just as mischievous and bratty as her older sister is and is not too happy when their mom falls for a mortal plumber. Ally and Amanda use magic to drive him away but it leads to them being exposed as witches. After he incidentally betrays Marigold by telling his brother, the Wiccan family is stripped of their magic and is cast out into the Mortal Realm. Ally begins haphazardly coping to living the mortal way with the new family.

characters.name: Amanda Wiccan
characters.description: Amanda WiccanBackground informationPortrayed byEmily HartCharacter informationGenderFemaleSpeciesWitchSourceAmanda Wiccanis the bratty younger cousin ofSabrina Spellman. Amanda was a formidable rival to her older cousin as her spoiled ways often put Sabrina or her friends in turmoil. However, as Amanda grew, she matured and became close with Sabrina. Sabrina first meets Amanda at the Spellman family Halloween dinner in 1996. Sabrina is put off by Amanda's bratiness and when she refuses to play with her, the little witchling traps Sabrina inside of a small glass jar, though she is shortly released. Amanda in season two, with her toy chest.

characters.name: Annabelle Saberhagen
characters.description: Annabelle SaberhagenAnnabelle and her husband LairdBackground informationPortrayed byVictoria JacksonCharacter informationGenderFemaleSpeciesWitchRelativesSalem Saberhagen(father)Mrs. Saberhagen(paternal grandmother)Larid Prescott (husband)Xavier "The Avenger" Prescott (father-in-law)Unnamed brother-in-lawStatusAliveSourceAnnabelle Saberhagenis awitchand the daughter ofSalem. It is unknown who Annabelle's mother is. Due to Salem trying to take over the world, he was not around for Annabelle during her childhood, forming a rift between the two. The rift widened when Salem wassentenced to be a catfor 100 years as punishment, not even bothering to tell Annabelle, out of shame. When an announcement was made that Annabelle was getting married to witch named Larid Prescott,Sabrina Spellmanwent to see Annabelle, and helped mend the rift between her and her father, and Salem performed all duties of father of the bride that he could in his furry state. Sabrina agreed to be Annabelle's maid of honour, but she soon discovered that anOther Realmwedding has strange traditions; the groom wears a suit of armour, the maid of honour wears cowboy boots and a Napoleon-style hat, has to carry a sapling down the aisle, blow up a balloon, and the father of the bride must wrestle the father of the groom for the permission of allowing his son to marry the bride. Because Salem was a cat, and in his own words "Protected by the humane society", Sabrina had to take on the father of the groom Xavier "The Avenger" Prescott. Thanks to interference by Salem, Sabrina pinned Prescott after a roll-up. Next, the bride and groom had to exchange ring fingers, and Sabrina had to kiss the bride. Annabelle was never seen again.

characters.name: Baines
characters.description: BainesCharacter informationOccupationNoneGenderMaleSpeciesMortalSource Ramageis a character that appears in theSecond SeasonofSabrina The Teenage Witch. He was played by actorRyan Francis. Baines (first name unknown) is an classmate atWestbridge High Schoolwhere he is friends withHarvey Kinkle. Along withRamageandDolrimple, they hang out at a garage near the school where they work on repairing an old car.Sabrina Spellmanchecks out the garage with them while disguised as a boy named Jack Spratsky and gets into a burping contest with them.

characters.name: Barnaby
characters.description: BarnabyBackground informationPortrayed byScott MichaelsonCharacter informationGenderMaleSpeciesMermanStatusAliveSourceBarnabyis amermanwho befriendedSabrina Spellmanand her friendGwenin the TV movie "Sabrina Down Under." Barnaby and his elder sisterFinare from a colony of merfolk near Australia. Barnaby sought out the humans because there was some illness spreading among the sea mammals. He first saw Gwen when she was diving with Sabrina, but got scared when Sabrina also surfaced. He tried again with another group of divers, but they weren’t very friendly. He got tired due to the sickness and washed up on the beach. Fortunately it was the two witches Sabrina and Gwen who found him and teleported him to their hotel room. To avert suspicion from a tailed man, Sabrina decided to give him legs for 48 hours by magic. Sabrina then brought Barnaby to Dr. Julian Martin, a local marine biologist to cure Barnaby. Dr. Julian Martin got suspicious of the new boy because he had the rash on the same shoulder where a spotted merman had it. After feeling better, Barnaby had fun with the time left until he regained his tail. Later Barnaby’s friend dolphin sought him out and told him that his sister had also contracted the disease. When Sabrina went to help Fin, Dr. Martin put a tracking device into her backpack and tracked the location of the merfolk colony. Sabrina stopped the ship that was on its way to the merfolk colony. Barnaby however forgot the time and transformed back into Merman right in the middle of driving a car. Dr. Martin saw him in his tail and captured him. Dr. Martin’s boss called the press, but before Barnaby was truly exposed, Sabrina saved him from the pool. Group of marine biologists had put a net up in front of the bay though and Barnaby was trapped. Fin game to his help and got tangled up in the net herself. Sabrina finally managed to convince Dr. martin to release Fin and Barnaby, and not to betray their secret. Later Barnaby and Fin swam with the witch friends at the reef that now was made into a preservation zone.

characters.name: Big Foot
characters.description: Bigfoot are hominid-like cryptid creatures. In the Season 7 episode "Witch Way Out", thehumanVictor had a very angry Bigfoot captured along with aMermaidand a Leprechaun (who was actually just a short Irish guy). AfterSabrina Spellmanregained hermagicthanks toHarveyand a distraction fromMorganandRoxie, she used her magic to put Victor in Bigfoot's cell who proceeded to beat Victor up several times. Finally Sabrina used her magic to transport Bigfoot, the Mermaid and the Leprechaun to their respective homes.

characters.name: Blind Faith
characters.description: Blind Faithis a one time character who appeared in the episodeIn Sabrina We Trust She is played by Deborah Zoe. After Sabrina's potion (which was used to gain Roxie's trust and was turned to mist) caused everyone in the neighborhood to start trusting her blindly, Blind Faith arrived informing Sabrina that because people started trusting her more and more due to the use of magic, she now must take over the role of Blind Faith, even giving Sabrina her seeing eye dog (which is a goat) and her blind glasses, which because she is no longer Blind Faith, she has regain her view.

characters.name: Bobunk
characters.description: Bobunk does not exist. InChristmas Amnesia,Salemsays toSabrina“Years ago, I was at a party in theOther Realmand I erased Bobunk.” However nothing is known about this Holiday.

characters.name: Brad Alcerro
characters.description: Bradley AlcerroBackground informationPortrayed byJon HuertasCharacter informationGenderMaleSpecies•Mortal(Witch Hunter)StatusAliveSourceBradley "Brad" AlcerroisHarvey Kinkle's old best friend who moves back toWestbridgein the show'sfourth seasonafter living in Texas. Not much is known about Brad's life except for the fact that he has a step-father. Brad is revealed to have awitch hunting gene, which makes his presence atWestbridge Higha threat to Sabrina. Brad initially dislikesSabrina, seemingly for no reason, until it is revealed byHildaandZeldathat he is aWitch Hunter. Brad doesn't know what he is, though whenever he is around awitchormagicis used in his presence, he senses it and immediately becomes cautious, which is why he is constantly rude to Sabrina. In the episode "Dreama, the Mouse," after Sabrina's tutee,Dreamauses magic in front of him, Brad declares his thinking that she is a witch which turns her into a mouse. Sabrina and her aunts then try to remove Brad's witch hunter gene or else Dreama will be stuck as a mouse for 100 years.

characters.name: Cassandra
characters.description: CassandraCharacter informationOccupationMember of theWitches' CouncilGenderFemaleSpeciesWitchSource Cassandrais character who appeared in the pilot ofSabrina The Teenage Witch, she was played by actress and entertainerDeborah Harry. Cassandra is a witch presiding in theThe Other Realmand a member of the originalWitches' Council. She often acts as the voice of reason; contrasting withDrell's impulsive nature and short temper. Cassandra was one of the Council members who listened to Sabrina's request to turn back time afterher first day of high school. Presumably, Cassandra was "put out to pasture" along with the rest of the original Witches' Council when younger witches took over.

characters.name: Cee Cee
characters.description: Cee CeeCharacter informationSpeciesMortalGenderFemaleSource Cee Ceeis friends ofLibby Chessler. Portrayed by Melissa Murray in Season 1 and Cee Cee Harshaw on Season 2. Cee Cee is usually seen with Libby and Jill thoughout the first three seasons. Her first appearnce was inBudnt Fridaylaughing and spreading rumors aboutSabrinaandJenny. Later in the episode under the influence of the truth sprinkles, Libby revealed that Cee Cee kissed her poster every night and Jill had a nose job that caused a fued between the three. After the truth sprinkles effect wore off Jill and Cee Cee made up with Libby. Her next most prominent role was inWhen Teens Colidewhen Libbys and Sabrinas personality were switched, she and Jill found Sabrina under Libbys evil more preferable and said that Sabrina was the most powerful person in the school, causing evil Sabrina to plot on taking over the school.

characters.name: Chip Cavanaugh
characters.description: Chip Cavanaugh is the brother of Morgan. He only appeared once in the season five's episode Sabrina's Perfect Christmas

characters.name: Diana Spellman
characters.description: Diana SpellmanBackground informationPortrayed byPamela Blair(season 2)Alley Mills(season 6 & 7)Character informationGenderFemaleSpeciesMortalRelativesGranny Becker(mother)Sabrina Spellman(daughter)Edward Spellman(ex-husband)Lydia Spellman(ex-mother-in-law)Hilda Spellman(ex-sister-in-law)Zelda Spellman(ex-sister-in-law)Sophia Spellman(ex-sister-in-law)Vesta Spellman(ex-sister-in-law)Harvey Kinkle(son-in-law)RelationshipsEdward Spellman(ex-husband)SourceDiana Spellman(néeBecker) is the mortal mother ofSabrina Spellman, the ex-daughter-in-law ofLydia Spellmanand the ex-wife ofEdward Spellman. She works as an archaeologist in Peru. Diana was once a professor of archaeology and married Edward, awitch. However, their marriage deteriorated and the two divorced when Sabrina was ten-years-old. Due toThe Witches Council's decree (hoping to discourage mortal-witch marriages) after Sabrina's powers were awakened when she turned sixteen, Diana couldn't see her daughter without being turned into a ball of wax. Diana inSeason2.

characters.name: Diana Spellman

She works as an archaeologist in Peru. Diana was once a professor of archaeology and married Edward, awitch. However, their marriage deteriorated and the two divorced when Sabrina was ten-years-old. Due toThe Witches Council's decree (hoping to discourage mortal-witch marriages) after Sabrina's powers were awakened when she turned sixteen, Diana couldn't see her daughter without being turned into a ball of wax. Diana inSeason2.

characters.name: Dolrimple
characters.description: DolrimpleCharacter informationOccupationNoneGenderMaleSpeciesMortalSource Dolrimpleis a character that appears in theSecond SeasonofSabrina The Teenage Witch. He was played by actorWalter Jones. Dolrimple (first name unknown) is an African-American classmate atWestbridge High Schoolwhere he is friends withHarvey Kinkle. Along withRamageandBaines, they hang out at a garage near the school where they work on repairing an old car.Sabrina Spellmanchecks out the garage with them while disguised as a boy named Jack Spratsky. He implies his father owns the garage by commenting his father wants to do inventory. He also turns up as a party guest at a party Sabrina throws ather house.

characters.name: Dr. Julian Martin
characters.description: Dr. Julian Martinis a marine biologist who lives in the Great Barrier Reef. ' Sabrina Spellmanadmired Dr. Martin for his work as an activist and researcher of sea life. However, Sabrina saw another side of Dr. Martin when he revealed that he planned on capturing and exposing themermaidcolony who secretly live in the reef, in his claim for fame. This proved life threatening as Dr. Martin was the only one with the antidote to the infection that was affecting the merpeople. Sabrina was able to get Dr. Martin to see the error of his ways and he decided against his plan.

characters.name: Dreama
characters.description: DreamaDreama with JulietteBackground informationPortrayed byChina ShaversCharacter informationGenderFemaleSpeciesWitchSourceDreamais awitchwho moved to the mortal realm at the age of 18 to attendWestbridge Highand be mentored bySabrinaso that she could get herWitch's License. Dreama is very clumsy with hermagicin general and is very inexperienced in witchcraft as she had neglected her magic as a child. Dreama has awitch familiar,Juliette Jingleheimer. In season four she is Sabrina's new best friend and apprentice. In the beginning of thefourth season, Dreama's family moved her to the mortal realm and she is enrolled at Sabrina's high school. Sabrina initially thinks she is simply a clumsy and absent minded new student, but she soon learns that it is her responsibility to mentor Dreama in the proper use of magic or risk losing her newly acquired Witch's License. Dreama was raised in the the Other Realm, so she often uses magic without thinking, lacks training, and creates disastrous, accidental results, which Sabrina must then try to reverse. Dreama accidentally uses magic in front of thewitch hunterBrad Alcerrowhen she is afflicted with Spring Fever. Brad says "I swear Dreama, sometimes I think you're a witch!" and Dreama instantly transforms into a mouse. After Sabrina and her aunts figure out how to change her back, they remove Brad's witch-hunting gene and Dreama reverts back to her normal form. Dreama is last seen at the senior prom, knocking on the bathroom door to check on Sabrina. She sees that Sabrina has been split into four different versions of herself and after they dismiss her, she walks away confused commenting "Interesting spell." She is never seen again after this, presumably having returned to the Other Realm, with her family.

characters.name: Drell
characters.description:
DrellDrellSpeciesWitchGenderMaleMagic ManifestationWhite SmokeFirst AppearancePilotLast AppearanceFirst KissPortrayed byPenn JilletteNo informationNo informationNo informationNo information Drellwas a powerful witch and was head ofThe Witches Council, until the council undergoes major changes and modernization. Drell is feared for his short temper and powerful magic. He is the ex-fiance ofHilda Spellman. Drell dated Hilda Spellman on and off and was once engaged to her, but left Hilda at the altar. He is known to send Hilda a pot roast when he's calling off a date, and half a pot roast when he is going to be late. Hilda finally builds up the strength to stand him up on a date and give him a taste of his own medicine. Drell has a pet mole named "Moley" and is very sensitive about people staring at him. 
WhenJennyis accidentally transported toThe Other Realm, Drell turns her into a grasshopper, until Sabrina finds a loophole and convinces Jenny it is all a dream. Drell only appears in Season 1, though presumably remained Head of the Witches Council until, at least, Season 6, when a new Witches Council, is shown on-screen.

characters.name: Ed
characters.description: EdEdGenderMaleMagic ManifestationOrange Light BallAppearanceI Fall to PiecesPortrayed byJohn DurbinNo informationNo informationNo informationNo informationNo informationNo information Edowns "Ed's Life and Storage" a business inThe Other Realmin which witches can be brought back to life after being seperated from the soul mate and turned to stone, or kept in the storage facility. Sabrina takes her Aunt Hilda to Ed after breaking up her andWilland gambles her love life with Josh in order to bring Hilda back to life.

characters.name: Edward Spellman (1996 TV Series)
characters.description: Edward SpellmanBackground informationPortrayed byRobby Benson(season 1)Doug Sheehan(season 4 - 7)Character informationGenderMaleSpeciesWitchSpouse(s)Diana Spellman(ex-wife)ChildrenSabrina Spellman(daughter)StatusAliveSourceEdward "Ted" Spellmanis a witch who is the father ofSabrina Spellman, husband of Gail, and stepfather of Donald Kippling. Ted is the eldest of his siblings, having four younger sisters. Ted fell in love with and married a mortal woman namedDiana Becker, and together they raised their daughter Sabrina. However, Ted and Diana's marriage became rocky and the two ultimately divorced. Ted's picture in "the Discovery of Magic."

characters.name: Edward Spellman (CAOS)
characters.description: Edward SpellmanBackground informationPortrayed byGeorgie DaburasCharacter informationOccupationHigh Priest (formerly)Headmaster (formerly)GenderMaleSpeciesWitchStatusDeceased(died in a plane crash)SourceEdward Spellmanis a recurring character onNetflix'sChilling Adventures of Sabrina. He is portrayed byGeorgie Daburas. He is the father ofSabrina Spellmanand the brother ofZeldaandHilda Spellman. Before his premature death, Edward was a visionary and a revolutionary High Priest of theChurch of Nightand the Headmaster of theAcademy of Unseen Arts.

characters.name: Emperor Larry
characters.description: Emperor Larry Emperor Larryis a member of the Spellman family and is the ruler of the country of Massapequa in theOther Realm. Larry came to visit his cousinsSabrina,Hilda, andZeldain the episode "And The Sabrina Goes To..." to discuss thefamily secretwith Sabrina and to ask Zelda to turn over rulership of her country, Massapequa Park, to him. When Zelda refuses, he declares war on the Spellman household. Eventually, Zelda gives in and Larry leaves in peace and gives Sabrina her clue to the family secret: a horn.
